title: 中考六选五 14: Maps, Apps and Sense of Direction
passage:
Navigation apps have made travelling much easier. People can type in a place and follow the route step by step. 1. ______ But depending completely on apps may weaken our sense of direction.

When people only follow instructions, they may stop noticing their surroundings. They turn left or right because the phone says so, not because they understand the area. 2. ______ Later, they may be unable to find the same place without the app.

A good sense of direction is not just about memory. It comes from observing landmarks, understanding distances and building a mental map. 3. ______ These skills grow stronger when people actively pay attention while moving around.

This does not mean navigation apps are bad. They are useful, especially in new or complex places. 4. ______ The problem appears when people let the app do all the thinking.

A better habit is to use apps and observation together. Before starting, look at the whole route instead of only the next turn. 5. ______ Over time, you may become less dependent on the screen.

questions.label: Questions 1-5 - Sentence Insertion
questions.instruction: Choose the best sentence from A-F for each blank in the passage. There is one extra sentence you do not need.

choices.text: Try to remember important roads, buildings or directions along the way.
As a result, the journey becomes easier but less meaningful for the brain.
These abilities help people understand where they are, not just where to go.
This saves time and reduces the fear of getting lost.
They should be treated as tools rather than replacements for awareness.
People should never use navigation apps in familiar cities.
